pitch_text: Arun Jaitley Stadium Delhi: square boundaries equidistant; ~73m straight, some sub-60m boundaries. Pitch lighter than earlier strip this venue — middle of wicket from popping crease described as very high scoring (250, runs galore); outside crease drier with patches — still a decent batting wicket, maybe not as extreme as typical here. Small ground. Spin likely significant — Axar, Kuldeep class. Last season average first innings ~198 at this ground; batters need to clear that bar tonight.
notes: Match 14 — DC won toss, bowled first → GT bats first (team1). IDs aligned with prior match14 run; --no-squad-check for bridge spellings.
